response.justification: Strong software engineer with 20 years of experience and recent exposure to AI infrastructure, but lacks the depth of AI specialization and strategic platform expertise required for a director-level AI strategy role. While current work at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure, the candidate has no demonstrated track record of building AI products or platforms, no advanced degree in AI, and limited evidence of cloud/platform strategy experience. The fit improves significantly if recent AI infrastructure work involved strategic platform design decisions.
strengths: 20 years of diverse software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems—well above the 15-year minimum
Proven technical innovator and platform builder; founded multiple open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and organized technical leadership activities
Currently engaged in AI infrastructure and MCP code generation at re:cinq, showing recent immersion in AI/agent frameworks
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (only 1 year at re:cinq) with no prior demonstrated products or platforms built with AI as a core focus
Missing preferred qualification of Master's/PhD in AI-related field; background is in general CS and photography/video processing
Career trajectory shows strong individual contributor progression but limited evidence of director-level strategic platform or cloud architecture work

key_factors.factor: AI specialization depth and product track record
